notes: Fixed update downloads on PCs that fail GitHub certificate checks.
Added a bundled trusted certificate file for update checks.
Added 16x16x16 chunk rendering for smoother editing on bigger builds.
Hid chunk render seam lines so chunks are not visible.
Popup windows now release the hidden player-camera cursor so buttons can be clicked.
Increased the built-in grass platform to 128x256x128.
Mouse player-camera mode now shows the crosshair and hides the mouse cursor until the M menu opens.
Player Camera now supports smoother mouse-look without dragging.
Open .schem, Help, and Settings stay outside the tool menu.
Improved mouse and keyboard controls for building.
Doors now auto-match hinges when placed as double doors.
Fixed A and D player movement direction.
